raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"city_transport","confidence":0.93,"matched_text":"Melbourne has a comprehensive public transport system, and it's easy to get around without a car.","distilled_fact":"Melbourne has a comprehensive public transport system, and it is easy to get around Melbourne without a car."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"train_network","confidence":0.9,"matched_text":"Melbourne has an extensive train network, with 16 lines that cover most areas of the city.","distilled_fact":"Melbourne's train network has 16 lines that cover most areas of Melbourne."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"tram_network","confidence":0.88,"matched_text":"Melbourne's tram network is one of the largest in the world.","distilled_fact":"Melbourne's tram network is one of the largest tram networks in the world."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"ticketing_system","confidence":0.93,"matched_text":"Melbourne's public transport ticketing system is called Myki.","distilled_fact":"Melbourne's public transport ticketing system is called Myki."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"city_feature","confidence":0.82,"matched_text":"Melbourne is a walkable city, and many attractions are within walking distance.","distilled_fact":"Melbourne is a walkable city, and many attractions in Melbourne are within walking distance."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"bike_share_service","confidence":0.77,"matched_text":"You can rent a bike through services like Melbourne Bike Share or oBike.","distilled_fact":"Melbourne bike rentals are available through services like Melbourne Bike Share or oBike."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"city_feature","confidence":0.84,"matched_text":"The city center has a free tram zone, making it easy to get around without paying for fares.","distilled_fact":"Melbourne's city center has a free tram zone."}]}
